headline: ₹0-50 Cr at risk (reputational only, no direct P&L impact) at stake — Adani Power receives NSE Sustainability ‘Aspiring’ Award, signaling progress in ESG disclosure but limited immediate impact.
what_matters: BRSR, GRI, DJSI, ESRS frameworks referenced; no new regulatory deadlines or penalties triggered.
No P/E rerating or margin impact; revenue at risk is negligible.
No material change in cost of capital or bond spreads; FII flows unaffected at this recognition level.
